description.content: Manage remote configuration key-value pairs
Returns all configuration schemas and their settings for the specified project environment.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Returns a specific configuration with all its settings.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates or updates the complete set of settings for a configuration.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Manage configuration settings and schemas
Returns all settings (key-value pairs) in the configuration.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Adds a new key-value setting to the configuration.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Manage targeting rules for configuration overrides
Returns all override rules for the environment. Rules target specific player segments with configuration overrides.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Creates a new override rule targeting a specific player segment with custom configuration values.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Updates an existing override rule's conditions or settings.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Deletes a targeting override rule.
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Unity Remote Config REST API enables launching new features, testing functionality, and modifying game configurations without requiring app updates. The Admin API manages settings, schemas, and override rules. The Runtime API delivers configuration values to game clients at runtime.

Contact Support:
 Name: Unity Support
